basic_details.job_title: MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has released the official Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with an M.Sc. in Physics, Photonics, Instrumentation, or Materials Science, or an M.Tech. in Nanoscience and Nanotechnology/ Materials Science can apply through email up to 04 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science
qualification.details: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science with an aptitude for Laser based research and having good communication skills. Candidates with UGC JRF/ NET, GATE will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MGU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant positions is 04-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or an M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position is 35 years. No specific minimum age limit has been mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 17,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job opportunity?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Technical Assistant / Project Assistant in this recruitment drive by Mahatma Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the MGU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which state and city is this job located in?
faq.answer: This government job opportunity is located in Kottayam, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Are candidates with UGC JRF/NET or GATE preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with UGC JRF/NET or GATE will be preferred for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position, indicating an added advantage for such applicants.
